name: wl_b3_n0
drl: rule W when accumulate( E0(tag == "z", $v : v) over window:length(0); $s : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: STANDING WALL GUARD (D-185): window:length(0) — the ORACLE throws (ArithmeticException: / by zero, out of subset) and the ENGINE rejects at parse with the clean N >= 1 error (drl.rs). engine_fenced keeps the lint verifying the wall stays up.
